title: Flightning99's Suzu
description: A resource pack I use to replace the Calico cat texture with one that more closely resembles my pet cat Suzu
body:
A Resource Pack that changes various textures to be modeled after things that matter to me in life

Textures
- Cat Spawn Egg texture updated to match my pet cat Suzu
- Calico Cat and Kitten textures updated to match my pet cat Suzu
- Tuxedo Cat and Kitten textures updated to match my brother's pet cat Sushi
- Tamed Wolf textures updated to change eye shape into eyebrows
- Rabbit textures updated to move their eyes to the sides of their heads
- Sleeping Fox textures updated to be less jarring
- Bat texture updated to remove the sclera from their eyes
- Dragon Egg Item texture updated to be more consistent with other Eggs
- Lit Purple Candle reverted back to the 1.17 Pre-Release 1 texture
- Cloud texture updated to have the pattern vary in density over time
- Unique Item textures for all Paintings
- Custom "Suzu" Painting and Item textures
  - Requires "Flightning99's Crafting Tweaks" Data Pack

Names
- Ghast renamed to Wild Ghast
- Happy Ghast renamed to Ghast
- Rabbit Hide renamed to Leather Scrap
- Egg renamed to White Chicken Egg
- Brown Egg renamed to Brown Chicken Egg
- Blue Egg renamed to Blue Chicken Egg

Sounds
- Quieter Minecarts at 25% original volume
